item.title: Epstein - If hoax, why be informant to a hoax?
item.description: The survivors have made it clear: sign the discharge petition, release the files NOW! This Monday (9/8), Cliff Cash will join us in leading constituents back to Congress to demand that the wishes of the survivors are honored. If you can, BE THERE! There are multiple examples of ways to get involved at the end of this video ✊? (video credit: NBC News)

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Early Christmas
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; It's a Beanie in a bag... A ...BeanBag... If you will.... Thanks to this awesome community, we're doing better today. Some things we desperately needed were gotten, I've actually got coffee, and my partner is out of the hospital and feeling better today. We still have to wait for her surgery, but we're getting back on track. Thank you so much to everyone who helped support us! Anyone who wants to can support Bean and the Piggies at my Ko-fi. I'll be uploading as many cute pictures of all the critters as I can manage, all free to view for everyone https://ko-fi.com/theunnamedpoet
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

Put them in jail. This is proof that govt is not for the people and by the people, but for the wealthy, to protect them and support them in their crimes.
item.dc:creator: trinxter

item.title: Insurance companies cite the vehicle's low production volume and its high repair costs for terminating policies.
item.description: Tesla's Cybertruck is turning out to be a full-blown disaster. Sales are circling the drain, with the Elon Musk-led automaker selling a mere 4,306 Cybertrucks in the second quarter of 2025, a stunning 50.8 percent drop over the same period last year. Resale values are cratering as well, with the value of a used Cybertruck plummeting by more than 30 percent over the span of a year. Even just insuring the stainless steel behemoths is turning into a massive headache. Owners insured through Hanover Insurance are being informed that their policy is being terminated. That's exactly what happened to Illinois-based owner Tobias Troy Vahl, as flagged by TorqueNews last month. Hanover Insurance cited the vehicle's low production volume and its high repair costs for terminating his policy. The news comes after insurer GEICO announced last year that it would no longer insure the Cybertruck. Owners have long complained of sky-high monthly premiums, reaching almost $1,000 in certain cases. Insurance marketplace Insurify found earlier this year that the average owner is paying $3,392 a year, or $282 a month, compared to the national average of just $2,336. In other words, the reasons not to buy a Cybertruck have far eclipsed any rationale for buying one — and with insurance companies refusing to touch the thing, that reality has never been more evident. https://futurism.com/the-byte/cybertruck-mess-insurance-companies-refusing
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Fire. As per usual it takes a black woman to call it like it is. No notes.
item.description:
Let me be real clear, and I need y'all to hear me like our lives depend on it because they do. We are not in a political debate. We are in a war, not a metaphorical one, not a symbolic one, but a strategic, well-funded, policy-backed, legally armed war for the soul of this country in the bodies of every person that don't fit the mold of a straight, cis, Christian, white man. And the wildest part is half of y'all still don't see it. You're playing checkers on a chessboard that's already been cleared. You think that they're just coming for trans folks, for queer kids, for immigrants, for poor people. No baby, they are coming for order and they're bringing chaos as a battering ram. White men, the most coddled demographic in American history have finally realized that they are no longer the majority numerically. And so now they're using power policy and platforms to cling to what they can't reclaim, which is control. They've decided that they can't run the show. And so they'll burn the whole damn theater down. And the gag is they told us. They told us who they were when they showed up in Charlottesville with tiki torches and khakis, when they stormed the Capitol in broad daylight. They banned books, rewriting the ones they left behind, outlawing truth, targeting teachers, sterilizing trans care, gagging free speech, gutting Medicaid, criminalizing being poor, being black, being alive. And while they are passing laws, we're posting memes. (0:01:15) Y'all keep waiting for the moment to get bad enough. The moment was Roe. The moment was George Floyd. The moment was Pulse. The moment was Trayvon. Was Uvalde. Was Obergefell being threatened. It was Tennessee banning drag. It was Florida erasing history. It was Texas legalizing bounty hunts on uteruses. It was Alabama writing segregation back into the books with a fresh coat of Christian nationalism. It was Trump staying quiet and screaming at the same time. And it was us arguing over which identity would leave the resistance while the fascists were halfway through their takeover. I am not here to play with y'all. I am not here to say vote and that I hope that you remember to vote in November. I am here to say mobilize or get mowed the down. Because while we're dissecting microaggressions, they're orchestrating genocide in suits and ties. And if that feels extreme to say, then you haven't been paying attention. This country is on fire. And instead of water, most of y'all brought vibes. White supremacy doesn't need a new plan. It's using the same playbook that it always had. Divide, distract, dominate. And what are we doing? Sitting in silos playing the Oppression Olympics. Letting respectability politics babysit our rage. And that ends today.
I don't care if you're gay, bi, trans, poor, disabled, undocumented, formerly incarcerated, fat, femme, sex working, devout, disillusioned, or just trying to make it through the next week. If you are not white, cis, straight, or Christian and a man with inherited wealth or generational impunity, you are on the list. And if you think for one second that aligning yourself with whiteness, with maleness, with neutrality will save you, baby, you are building the gallows with your silence. So let's get honest. You want to know why they're winning? It's because they unify in fear. You want to know why we keep losing? It's because we fracture in ego. The right builds armies and the left builds hashtags. This is your clarion call. If you were wondering where the revolution is, it's wherever you are standing. If you are wondering what to do, start where you are. Call your lawmakers, shut down your boardrooms, go and fund black and queer and trans organizations. Walk out, sit in, raise hell and do it now. Because when they come knocking for the next person, don't you dare act surprised that there is nobody left to answer the door for you. If it gets you fired, let it. If it finally makes them mad enough to see you, let it. Because baby, if we don't act, we are not surviving, we are surrendering. And I don't know about y'all, but I wasn't born to die quietly. I was born to be a problem. So let's become a problem that they can't solve together. https://www.hopegiselle.com/about https://hopegiselle.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists
